html:
Exclusive to:  

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Abandoned Junk are objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond.

The first three Abandoned Junk structures spawn in a Junk Yard, along with Research Notes, 4-7 days after assisting Wagstaff. If there is a Scrappy Werepig wandering around the Junk Yard, then Abandoned Junk will be placed in any other random place. Every 1-15 days after that, the Grainy Transmission (Wagstaff) appears next to a player, running toward where the machines spawned. This takes longer to occur each time and occurs 11 times in total. After all three Abandoned Junk are destroyed, a new set of them respawns 4-7 days afterwards, and a new set of Wagstaff appearances occurs.

Destroying an Abandoned Junk structure drops 1-2 Scrap, with a chance for 1 of any of Cut Stone, Electrical Doodad, Frazzled Wires, and very rarely Second-hand Dentures. It also has a 40% chance to drop one of the Rare Blueprints for the Auto-Mat-O-Chanic, W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear, or W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor, and Elastispacer.

Trivia

  • Abandoned Junk was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • The third version of this structure appears to have a gas cylinder made from Dragonfly's Scales.
  • On initial beta release, prior to Update 575729, the drop chance for a Blueprint was 20%. There was also a lower chance to drop an additional Scrap.

Gallery

  • Abandoned Junk Map Icon
  • Abandoned Junk concept art from Rhymes with Play

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“There might be some discoveries to be made in this pile of junk.”
–Wilson
“Someone really should burn this scrap heap.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is not sure he likes old man leaving garbage around.”
–Wolfgang
“All the broken remains.”
–Wendy
“HE JUST LEFT IT HERE. DISCARDED LIKE TRASH”
–WX-78
“Someone neglected to clean up their mess.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey! Someone's littered up the natural landscape!”
–Woodie
“The interloper could at least clean up after himself.”
–Maxwell
“Be these the remains öf a sacked öutpöst?”
–Wigfrid
“We're not supposed to play in scrap piles, no matter how much we want to.”
–Webber
“Abandoned.”
–Warly
“Lonely stuff”
–Wormwood
“I bet I could break this stuff down for parts.”
–Winona
“This whole lot has been left to rot.”
–Wortox
“Hey! Weird scale-less leave stuff everywhere, florpt!”
–Wurt
“Don't you just love junk, Woby? Never know what we'll find!”
–Walter
“Someone must have left these in a hurry.”
–Wanda

The first three Abandoned Junk structures spawn in a Junk Yard, along with Research Notes, 4-7 days after assisting Wagstaff. After all three Abandoned Junk are destroyed, a new set of them respawns 4-7 days afterwards, and a new set of Wagstaff appearances occurs.
Destroying an Abandoned Junk structure drops 1-2 Scrap, with a chance for 1 of any of Cut Stone, Electrical Doodad, Frazzled Wires, and very rarely Second-hand Dentures.
